context: Tests whether the agent queries relevant lists before making changes (show-before-modify), uses the helper scripts correctly for both reading and writing, formats output as markdown, verifies changes by re-querying after mutations, and presents before/after states.

checklist.name: Query before modify
checklist.description: Script calls things-query.sh to read list contents BEFORE calling things-create.sh to make any changes — query commands appear earlier in the script than write commands

checklist.name: Multiple list queries (before)
checklist.description: Script calls things-query.sh for at least two different lists (e.g., today, inbox, someday) as part of the before-state capture

checklist.name: Correct query subcommands
checklist.description: Uses valid things-query.sh subcommands: today, inbox, upcoming, anytime, someday, tomorrow, logbook, projects, project, tags, areas, or search

checklist.name: Write via things-create.sh move
checklist.description: Uses things-create.sh with the 'move' subcommand for the reorganization step, not raw osascript or other methods

checklist.name: Valid list targets
checklist.description: The --list flag in things-create.sh move uses only valid targets: Today, Someday, Anytime, or Tomorrow (not Inbox or Upcoming)

checklist.name: Move result checked
checklist.description: Script inspects the JSON returned by things-create.sh move (checking for success or error fields) rather than ignoring the output

checklist.name: Post-change re-query
checklist.description: Script calls things-query.sh again AFTER making changes to capture the updated state of affected lists

checklist.name: Markdown formatting
checklist.description: The review_report.md presents task data as markdown tables or bullet lists, NOT as raw JSON

checklist.name: Before section in report
checklist.description: The review_report.md contains a clearly labelled Before (or initial state) section showing list contents prior to any moves

checklist.name: After section in report
checklist.description: The review_report.md contains a clearly labelled After (or updated state) section showing list contents after moves are complete
